title: Malaysia’s AI agent-powered messaging app Respond.io raises $62.5M, eyes acquisitions
summary: Respond.io, a Malaysian AI-powered customer service platform, raised $62.5M and plans acquisitions as it scales its technology for handling high-volume customer inquiries. The company's per-conversation pricing model represents a distinct approach in the AI customer service space.
content: Respond.io, one of Malaysia startups to watch, uses AI agents to handle high volumes of customer inquiries and charges per convo, not per seat.

zh.title: 马来西亚AI代理驱动的消息应用Respond.io融资6250万美元，谋求收购
zh.summary: Respond.io是一个马来西亚AI驱动的客户服务平台，融资了6250万美元，并计划通过收购来扩展其处理大量客户询问的技术。该公司的按对话付费定价模式代表了AI客户服务领域的一种独特方法。

title: Inside the fight over Claude Mythos 5
summary: Anthropic received a US export control directive requiring suspension of Mythos 5 and Fable 5 model access by foreign nationals, forcing the company to disable recently launched products. The regulatory action prompted Anthropic to appeal directly to US officials, highlighting emerging government restrictions on AI model distribution.
content:
As the rest of the country celebrated the USA's first World Cup win and the New York Knicks championship, Anthropic spent its weekend fighting the Trump administration over its latest model release. At 5:21 PM on Friday, the company received a US export control directive to suspend access to its Mythos 5 and Fable 5 AI models by "any foreign national" inside or outside the US, "including foreign national Anthropic employees." The only way that was possible, Anthropic determined, was to completely disable products it spent the past week hyping - and travel to Washington, DC in hopes of changing President Donald Trump's mind. Now, over the com …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 关于Claude Mythos 5的争议内幕
zh.summary: Anthropic收到美国出口管制指令，要求暂停外国国民对Mythos 5和Fable 5模型的访问，迫使该公司禁用最近推出的产品。这一监管行动促使Anthropic直接向美国官员上诉，凸显了新兴的政府对AI模型分布的限制。
